nodes.label: AI as brainstorming and idea generator

nodes.label: AI as collaborative partner

nodes.label: Personal creative skill development
nodes.grounding_span: I want to maintain my creative muscles as well

nodes.label: Resistance to AI in creative work
nodes.grounding_span: I do think that it could decrease creativity from us but I want to maintain my creative muscles as well

nodes.label: Systematic iterative decomposition of tasks
